skills.name: news_research
skills.description: Find and summarize news articles for a topic or company.

skills.name: market_intelligence
skills.description: Research company news, market context, and web coverage.

skills.name: finance_lookup
skills.description: Retrieve stock prices, market quotes, and exchange rates.

skills.name: weather_briefing
skills.description: Look up current weather and forecast information.

skills.name: local_discovery
skills.description: Find nearby places, restaurants, and web results for a location.

skills.name: calculation
skills.description: Solve math expressions and numerical questions.

skills.name: code_investigation

skills.name: social_monitoring

skills.name: schedule_assistant

examples: what meetings do I have tomorrow
